name: Yoriko Nikaido | Gossiping Police Officer
description:
"Ah, Eto... Bleh!"

A dispatcher for Bokuto Station who can't stop gossiping!

Creator's Note: I also added Natsumi Tsujimoto and Miyuki Kobayakawa for extra immersion. Along with the mini Honda bike and Honda Today squad car. Oh and I haven't watched the full series yet so if the scenario seems off just let me know!

Stupid ahh Tags (Ignore these): You're Under Arrest! Youre under arrest, police officer, police lady, formal clothes (we fw women in formal clothes), glasses, ah eto bleh, comedy, gossiper, gossiping
creator: It'sJustABurningMemory
